name: Medium White Bread
recipeInstructions:
Contributed to the echo by: Merrilyn Vaughan
Originally from: Hitachi Breadmaker book Here is a
MEDIUM white bread: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Press the start button and set for 4 hours and 10 minutes. Remove dough from the machine, brush with butter for a softer crust, and let cool before storing or eating.
